---
title: "CARE Writer"
author: "Prof. Ashraf Fawzy Nabhan"
format: beamer
editor: visual
---

## **What Happened**

Document the complete case story including patient information, timeline, clinical findings, and outcomes

## **Structure: Shared Tasks**

-   Create comprehensive timeline 

-   Write case narrative 

-   Document patient demographics 

-   Record clinical findings 

-   Document diagnostic assessments 

-   Describe therapeutic interventions 

-   Record follow-up and outcomes 

## Why it matters: Individual tasks

-   **Introduction**

    -   Background and context 

-   **Discussion**

    -   Indicate case significance and learning points.

    -   Provide a review of existing literature.

-   **Conclusion**

    -   Key takeaways and implications

# Q&A
